title: Bosch 7x PRO Wood HSS Hex Brad Point Drill Bit Set (for Softwood, Hardwood, Ø 2,0, 3,0, 3,0, 4,0, 5,0, 6,0, 8,0 mm, Professional Accessory Rotary Drill/Drivers)
features: Highly efficient for carpenters and woodworkers: Precision
Hex shank for a strong connection and maximum torque transmission in three-jaw chucks and ¼" internal hex tool holders
For drilling in hardwood and softwood as well as in plastic coated boards, eg when drilling through holes and pocket holes for doweling or furniture assembly
Scope of delivery: Bosch PRO Wood HSS Brad Point Drill Bit Set, 7 pcs
description: Product Description Designed for drilling in wood - Starting new holes precisely where you need them can be a challenge. Not with PRO Wood HSS Brad Point Drill Bits, designed for precise drilling in hardwood and softwood. The PRO Wood HSS Brad Point Drill Bits bring solution to your woodworking challenges. We made them from high-speed steel (HSS), which means they are hard-wearing and resistant to heat. Their centering tip, or Brad Point, ensures you can start holes precisely where you need them. The holes are round and splinter-free due to sharp cutting spurs at the tip of the drill bit. The two-flute design helps remove chips and prevents them from clogging the holes, make your drilling fast and efficient. Hex shank for a strong connection and maximum torque transmission in three-jaw chucks and ¼" internal hex tool holders Box Contains 1 x BOSCH 2607019923 Robust Round Shaft Wooden Drill Bit Set
